title: Host Runtime
purpose: `io/host_runtime.vitl` is a public stdlib surface inside the `io` family. It should be read as one focused slice of the broader family responsibility: File, buffer, stream, stdio, and host-runtime access helpers.
use_cases: A manifest is loaded through `io`, parsed elsewhere, validated elsewhere, and only then emitted back through `io`.
A stdio helper should explain where user-facing text enters the flow.
